tagline: Raw data in. Clean results out.

upload.title:
Raw data in.
Clean results out.
upload.subtitle: Upload your qPCR spreadsheet from any machine. Get ddCt analysis, publication-ready graphs, and a clean CSV. All in your browser — your data never leaves.
upload.formats: .xlsx, .xls, or .csv — QuantStudio, CFX, LightCycler, ABI 7500, Biomark, and more
upload.privacy: Your data never leaves your browser
upload.requestFormatCta: Upload a sample spreadsheet and we'll add support for it.

configure.title: Configure analysis
configure.efficiencyHelp: Enter primer efficiency for each target (default: 2.0 = 100%)
configure.sampleClassificationHelp: Auto-detected sample roles. Click to change. Standards and NTCs are excluded from analysis.

results.customizeHelp: Adjust colors, fonts, dimensions, and journal presets

footer.tagline: Built for scientists who'd rather be in the lab.
footer.privacy: 100% client-side — your data never leaves your browser.

landing.heroTitle:
Raw data in.
Clean results out.
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your qPCR spreadsheet from any machine. Get publication-ready results in seconds. All in your browser — your data never leaves.
landing.trustBadge: Your data never leaves your browser. No server processing. No tracking.
landing.step1Desc: Drop your spreadsheet from any qPCR machine
landing.step2Desc: Pick your reference gene and control group
landing.step3Desc: Download clean CSV and publication-ready figures
landing.dropTitle: Try it now — no account needed
landing.qcBody: VoilaPCR automatically scans your data for NTC contamination, replicate scatter, reference gene instability, and more. Every analysis includes a quality check.
landing.drBody: Upload a screenshot of your weird curve or describe your problem. Dr. qPCR diagnoses it in seconds, with specific fixes — not vague advice.
landing.graphBody: Customize colors, fonts, error bars, significance brackets, and export at 300 DPI. Presets for Nature, Cell, PLOS ONE, and Science.
landing.instrumentsCta: Don't see your machine? Upload a sample file and we'll add support for it.
landing.trustBody: All qPCR computation runs in your browser. Your spreadsheet data is never uploaded to any server. We don't use Google Analytics or any third-party trackers.
landing.citationTitle: If you use VoilaPCR in your research, please cite:
landing.citationAPA: VoilaPCR (2026). VoilaPCR: Web-based qPCR data analysis platform. https://voilapcr.com
landing.emailTitle: Get notified when we add new features

templates.title: Saved Templates
templates.proLimit: Free tier: 1 template. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited.

feedback.formatThanks: Thanks! We'll email you when {{machine}} is supported.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Drop your qPCR spreadsheet — any format, any machine.

howItWorks.step3Desc: Get publication-ready graphs, clean CSV, and automated QC diagnostics.
